What would you like to do with Navan?
Manage business travel and expense with ease.

Get started
Watch a demo video
Go to Navan →
Trusted by thousands of companies
The AI-powered business travel and expense platform
From team offsites to deal-closing dinners, make business travel effortless for frequent travelers while maintaining control over spend.
Unrivaled visibility,
control, and savings
Navan Travel
One-Stop Shop
Book and manage travel in a single place. Empower employees to book from an extensive inventory, with the help of industry-leading AI, while staying within your spending limits.
Get started with Navan Travel
Your browser does not support the video tag.
Navan Expense
Centralized Spend
Streamline your expense management from swipe to reconciliation. Automate categorization, reports, and reimbursements. Boost productivity and optimize savings with AI-powered insights.
Get started with Navan Expense
Your browser does not support the video tag.
Pay Your Way
Payments
Optimize your T&E program for control and efficiency, no matter how your teams spend. Leverage Navan corporate cards, Navan Connect (compatible with Visa, Mastercard, and American Express corporate cards), and reimbursements for spending on personal cards.
Navan Connect partners with:
Your browser does not support the video tag.
Introducing Navan Edge
Make work trips worth it
Navan Edge is your AI travel assistant handling flights, hotels, and restaurants while getting you the perks you deserve — with 24/7 human support right in the chat.
Learn more

Sky-high company savings
Intelligent corporate travel management that can drive real savings
1
More options, more deals
Navan provides your team with special rates among a massive travel inventory featuring top suppliers.
2
Spend guardrails
Custom policies let your employees book and spend as needed while protecting the company budget.
3
Navan Rewards
Reward employees when they book travel below budget — at no cost to you.
Proud to partner with
Industry-leading technology with a personal touch
Tackle travel on your own
Now your employees can book, update, or cancel bookings on their own — via chat or with the tap of a button.
Or let our experts handle it
Our experts are ready 24/7 to solve any travel crisis. Want a premium, high-touch service for your travel needs? Our seasoned Reed & Mackay are available with Navan Pro.
From small businesses to global enterprises —
all companies save with Navan

About Navan
Navan is the global AI-powered
business travel
and
expense management platform
that makes travel easy for frequent travelers. powering travel programs at more than 10,000 companies, including
Canva
,
HelloFresh
, DoorDash,
Duolingo
, and Steelcase. The platform simplifies travel, payments, and expense management with intuitive tools for booking, automated payments with built-in virtual cards, and seamless expense reporting. Navan delivers
exceptional customer satisfaction
, with a 96% CSAT and 43 NPS. Founded in 2015 by Ariel Cohen and Ilan Twig as TripActions, Navan reported $613M in LTM revenue and $7.6B in LTM gross booking volume, each for the twelve months ended July 31, 2025. The company aims to empower organizations worldwide to make corporate travel smarter and more efficient. Learn more at
navan.com
.

"Booking through Navan makes our lives easier while saving the company money"
Amanda Kim
Commercial accountant
Frequently Asked Questions
What’s the difference between Navan Business and Navan Enterprise?
Navan Business and Navan Enterprise both have all the travel and expense features companies love. In addition, Navan Enterprise offers support features to help with implementing and scaling the platform.
Does the Navan Business price change after a certain amount of trips?
As long as your company has 300 or fewer employees, there is no limit to how many trips you can book with Navan Travel. Navan Expense is free for the first 5 monthly expensing users, and then is $15 per user per month. If your company has more than 300 employees, request a demo to learn more.
What is an expensing user?
An active expense user is anyone who submits a transaction into Navan expense by manual transaction or Navan Connect.
Is Navan only for booking flights?
No, travelers can book flights, hotels, car rentals, and trains on Navan. Our global inventory provides a wide variety of options so travelers can book the perfect itinerary.
Why is it free for companies of up to 300 employees to use Navan Business?
Navan is powered by travel providers’ commission fees—so you get access to a huge inventory without any cost to you.
How secure is Navan?
The security of our customer’s data is our top priority. We use advanced security measures to preserve the integrity and privacy of your data, and adhere to strict data protection laws. We are committed to keeping your data safe. You can always access our
privacy policy
and our
security protocol
.
Do you have a mobile app?
Yes. The Navan mobile app is the perfect trip companion for traveling and/or expensing employees.

will take your company

Opt-Out Request Honored
Privacy Preference Center
We value your privacy. We use cookies for a variety of purposes including advertising and to learn about how you interact on our website. Some of these cookies are considered a “sale” and “sharing” under the California Privacy Rights Act (CPRA) or targeted advertising. As such, you can opt-out of third party advertising and tracking cookies that are not considered service providers by turning off these cookies below or by broadcasting the global privacy control signal on a browser/extension that supports it. 

Please note that if you visit our website from a different computer or device or clear your cookies from your browser, you will need to provide your preferences again.
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These strictly necessary cookies allow you access to our website and services, applications, and tools. They are used for essential purposes such as identifying irregular website behavior, preventing fraudulent activity and improving security.
Sale of Personal Data
Sale of Personal Data
Under the California Consumer Privacy Act, you have the right to opt-out of the sale of your personal information to third parties. These cookies collect information for analytics and to personalize your experience with targeted ads. You may exercise your right to opt out of the sale of personal information by using this toggle switch.
                If you opt out we will not be able to offer you personalised ads and will not hand over your personal information to any third parties. Additionally, you may contact our legal department for further clarification about your rights as a California consumer by using this Exercise My Rights link. If you have enabled privacy controls on your browser (such as a plugin), we have to take that as a valid request to opt-out. Therefore we would not be able to track your activity through the web. This may affect our ability to personalize ads according to your preferences.
Targeting Cookies
Switch Label
label
These cookies allow us to deliver content, including ads relevant to your interests, on our website/services or on third-party sites.
Analytics Cookies
Analytics Cookies
Analytics cookies collect information about your use of the Site and enable us to improve the way it works. For example, analytics cookies show us which are the most frequently visited pages on the Site, help us record any difficulties you have with the Site, and show us whether our advertising is effective or not. This allows us to see the overall patterns of usage on the Site, rather than the usage of a single person. We use the information to analyze Site traffic, but we do not examine this information for individually identifying information.
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies help us assess the performance of our website and services, including as part of our analytics practices to help us understand how individuals use the website/services.
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies allow us to offer you enhanced functionality when using the website and services. The cookies collect information about your choices and preferences and allow us to remember language or other local settings and customize the Site accordingly.

The Navan card is issued by Celtic Bank (Member FDIC), Stripe Technology Europe Limited, Stripe Payments UK Limited, Adyen N.V. (EU), Adyen N.V. San Francisco Branch (US), and Adyen N.V. London Branch (UK)
About Navan
Navan is the global AI-powered
business travel
and
expense management platform
that makes travel easy for frequent travelers. powering travel programs at more than 10,000 companies, including
Canva
,
HelloFresh
, DoorDash,
Duolingo
, and Steelcase. The platform simplifies travel, payments, and expense management with intuitive tools for booking, automated payments with built-in virtual cards, and seamless expense reporting. Navan delivers
exceptional customer satisfaction
, with a 96% CSAT and 43 NPS. Founded in 2015 by Ariel Cohen and Ilan Twig as TripActions, Navan reported $613M in LTM revenue and $7.6B in LTM gross booking volume, each for the twelve months ended July 31, 2025. The company aims to empower organizations worldwide to make corporate travel smarter and more efficient. Learn more at
navan.com
.

docs.title: Home | Navan Help Center
docs.text:
Home | Navan Help Center
Help Center
Home
Trips
Events
Need help?
Log in
How can we help?
For myself
For myself
Browse top categories
Getting started
Changing a booking
Booking flights
Profile and settings
Booking hotels
See all categories
Browse top articles
How do I make or manage a booking?
Learn how to start booking and manage your bookings in Navan.
Read article
Where can I find Navan video tutorials?
Video tutorials for Navan tavelers, admins, and expense users. Available in English, French, and German.
Read article
How do I complete and manage my Navan profile?
Learn how to complete your Navan traveler profile before you start booking.
Read article
What's the difference between prepay and pay-at-hotel rooms?
Learn about the different payment schedules available for hotels (prepay versus pay at hotel).
Read article
How do Navan virtual cards work for pay-at-hotel bookings?
Learn about the process for booking pay-at-hotel room inventory with a Navan virtual card.
Read article
How do I book a flight?
Learn how to book a one-way or roundtrip flight on Navan.
Read article

analysis.name: Navan
analysis.value_proposition: AI-powered business travel and expense management platform that makes travel easy for frequent travelers while giving companies control and savings.
analysis.ideal_customer: Companies (SMB up to 300 employees free; enterprise via sales) managing corporate travel, expenses, and payments for frequent business travelers

features.name: corporate travel booking
features.description: Book flights, hotels, car rentals, and trains in one platform
features.evidence_quote: travelers can book flights, hotels, car rentals, and trains on Navan

features.name: global travel inventory
features.description: Access to global travel inventory with exclusive negotiated rates
features.evidence_quote: Global travel inventory and exclusive rates

features.name: policy and approval workflows
features.description: Unlimited configurable travel/spend policies and approval workflows
features.evidence_quote: Unlimited policy and approval workflows

features.name: self-serve trip changes
features.description: Travelers can modify bookings themselves without agent help
features.evidence_quote: Self-serve changes and 24/7 travel support agents

features.name: 24/7 travel support
features.description: Around-the-clock human travel support agents
features.evidence_quote: Self-serve changes and 24/7 travel support agents

features.name: navan rewards
features.description: Rewards program that gives travelers points/perks for staying in policy
features.evidence_quote: Navan Rewards program

features.name: customizable reports
features.description: Reports that can be tailored to company needs
features.evidence_quote: Customizable reports

features.name: hris integrations
features.description: 30+ HRIS integrations to sync employee data
features.evidence_quote: 30+ seamless HRIS integrations

features.name: expense management
features.description: Manage business expenses and issue reimbursements
features.evidence_quote: Manage expenses and issue reimbursements

features.name: reimbursements
features.description: Issue employee reimbursements for out-of-pocket spend
features.evidence_quote: Manage expenses and issue reimbursements

features.name: corporate card connect
features.description: Connect existing corporate/business credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex) via Navan Connect
features.evidence_quote: Connect existing corporate or business credit cards

features.name: receipt scanning
features.description: OCR receipt capture for on-the-go expense reporting
features.evidence_quote: Receipt scanning for on-the-go expenses

features.name: erp integrations
features.description: Integrations with most major ERPs for expense data sync
features.evidence_quote: Seamless integrations with most ERPs

features.name: navan corporate cards
features.description: Native Navan-issued virtual and physical corporate cards
features.evidence_quote: Navan corporate cards, Navan Connect... reimbursements

features.name: virtual cards
features.description: Built-in virtual cards used for automated payments including pay-at-hotel
features.evidence_quote: How do Navan virtual cards work for pay-at-hotel bookings?

features.name: ai expense categorization
features.description: AI automatically categorizes and reconciles expenses
features.evidence_quote: AI automatically categorizes and reconciles expenses

features.name: real-time expense visibility
features.description: Full real-time visibility into every expense
features.evidence_quote: Get full visibility into every expense in real-time

features.name: out-of-policy flagging
features.description: Automatically flags out-of-policy transactions
features.evidence_quote: Automatically flag out-of-policy transactions

features.name: navan edge
features.description: AI travel assistant for frequent travelers handling flights, hotels, restaurants
features.evidence_quote: Navan Edge is your AI travel assistant handling flights, hotels, and restaurants

features.name: navan events
features.description: End-to-end event management: venue sourcing and event ops
features.evidence_quote: Navan Events — Source venues and manage events end-to-end

features.name: personal travel
features.description: Employees can book personal trips via Navan and earn rewards
features.evidence_quote: Get Navan Rewards for personal trips

features.name: advanced analytics
features.description: Advanced T&E analytics for program managers
features.evidence_quote: Advanced Analytics

features.name: program management
features.description: Tools to manage the corporate travel program
features.evidence_quote: Program Management

features.name: sustainability reporting
features.description: Track and report on travel emissions / sustainability
features.evidence_quote: Sustainability

features.name: duty of care
features.description: Know where travelers are for safety and duty of care
features.evidence_quote: Enhance your duty of care by knowing where your travelers are

features.name: spend guardrails
features.description: Set spend limits and guardrails to keep bookings within policy
features.evidence_quote: Set spend guardrails so everyone stays within policy

features.name: guest booking
features.description: Invite employees & guests to book their own travel
features.evidence_quote: Invite employees & guests to book their own travel

features.name: calendar sync
features.description: Automate calendar syncing of travel itineraries
features.evidence_quote: Automate itinerary emails, calendar syncing, and loyalty accumulation

features.name: itinerary email automation
features.description: Automatic itinerary emails for exec/EA workflows
features.evidence_quote: Automate itinerary emails, calendar syncing, and loyalty accumulation

features.name: loyalty program accumulation
features.description: Automatic loyalty club points accumulation across airlines/hotels
features.evidence_quote: Earn points from your favorite loyalty clubs

features.name: ai personal travel assistant
features.description: AI-powered assistant for booking and managing trips
features.evidence_quote: Navan's AI-powered personal travel assistant

features.name: executive assistant workflows
features.description: EA-specific features surfacing exec's favorite options
features.evidence_quote: your exec's favorite travel options are shown first

features.name: pay-at-hotel bookings
features.description: Support for both prepay and pay-at-hotel booking options
features.evidence_quote: prepay versus pay at hotel

features.name: mobile app
features.description: iOS/Android app for travel and expensing on the go
features.evidence_quote: The Navan mobile app is the perfect trip companion

features.name: video tutorials
features.description: In-product video tutorials for travelers, admins, expense users (EN/FR/DE)
features.evidence_quote: Video tutorials for Navan tavelers, admins, and expense users

features.name: traveler profiles
features.description: Traveler profile management with preferences
features.evidence_quote: How do I complete and manage my Navan profile?

features.name: global program coverage
features.description: Global corporate travel program coverage across regions
features.evidence_quote: Global program coverage

features.name: dedicated account executive
features.description: Named AE assigned to enterprise accounts
features.evidence_quote: Designated Account Executive

features.name: dedicated customer success manager
features.description: Named CSM for enterprise customers
features.evidence_quote: Dedicated Customer Success Manager

features.name: custom implementation
features.description: White-glove custom implementation for enterprise
features.evidence_quote: Custom implementation

features.name: corporate negotiated rates
features.description: Ability to load company-negotiated travel rates
features.evidence_quote: Corporate negotiated rates

features.name: back office capabilities
features.description: Comprehensive back-office finance capabilities
features.evidence_quote: Comprehensive back office capabilities

features.name: enterprise-grade travel support
features.description: Enhanced travel support for enterprise programs
features.evidence_quote: Enterprise-grade travel support

features.name: multi-region support
features.description: Localized product in FR, DE, NL, ES, UK, US
features.evidence_quote: France Germany Netherlands Spain United Kingdom United States

features.name: data security & compliance
features.description: Advanced security measures and adherence to data protection laws
features.evidence_quote: We use advanced security measures... adhere to strict data protection laws

differentiators: Free platform for companies up to 300 employees (commission-funded model)
Unified travel + expense + payments in one platform
AI-powered booking and expense automation (Navan Edge, AI categorization)
Navan Rewards — traveler incentives for staying in policy
Powers travel at 10,000+ companies including Canva, HelloFresh, DoorDash, Duolingo, Steelcase
Study shows customers save 16% on business travel
Navan Connect: bring your own corporate card (Visa/MC/Amex compatible)

recent_ships.what: Navan Edge — AI travel assistant for frequent travelers, early access
recent_ships.source: Introducing Navan Edge — The new standard for frequent travelers: tailored, rewarding, effortless

praised: "Navan just feels so much easier. It's super seamless."
"Booking through Navan makes our lives easier while saving the company money" — Amanda Kim, Commercial accountant
complaints: HN: "Navan founders cashing out, while company losing 100M" — investor/financial-health skepticism
HN: "Navan IPO tumbles 20% after historic debut under SEC shutdown workaround" — rocky public-market debut
HN thread on recreating receipt scan feature suggests some devs view it as replicable rather than deeply differentiated
sources: g2 (rating aggregate only — G2 page blocked)

free_tier.limits: Free for companies up to 300 employees; expense free for first 5 monthly expensing users, then $15/user/month

tiers.name: Navan Business
tiers.headline_inclusions: Free for ≤300 employees: global inventory, unlimited policies, 24/7 support, Rewards, 30+ HRIS, expense free for 5 users

tiers.name: Navan Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything in Business + full Travel & Expense suite, unlimited users, global coverage, dedicated AE & CSM, custom implementation

pricing.notes: Travel is free (commission-funded via travel providers). Expense is free for first 5 monthly expensing users, then $15/user/month. Above 300 employees requires demo/Enterprise. An expensing user = anyone submitting a transaction (manual or via Navan Connect).

recent_hn.title: How to build your own software factory
